startPoint.en: Talk to Thorvald the Warrior in Skulgrimen's Battle Gear in Rellekka.
startPoint.es: Habla con Thorvald the Warrior en Skulgrimen's Battle Gear en Rellekka.

quests: A Fairy Tale II - Cure a Queen

rewards.display: Antique lamp giving 30,000 experience in any skill of level 75 or higher.

rewards.name: Balmung
rewards.display: An enhanced Balmung axe, depending on the colour of gem made: Turning the jewel red will morph the Balmung into a Crimson Balmung. Turning the jewel blue will morph the Balmung into a Cobalt Balmung. Turning the jewel green will morph the Balmung into a Viridian Balmung. Using the "Toggle-colour" option to turn it into an Achromatic Balmung.

text.en: Talk to Thorvald the Warrior north of Rellekka inside Skulgrimen's Battle Gear.
text.es: Habla con Thorvald the Warrior al norte de Rellekka, dentro de Skulgrimen's Battle Gear.

text.en: Climb down the ladder.
text.es: Baja por la escalera.

text.en: Talk to Koschei the Deathless.
text.es: Habla con Koschei the Deathless.

text.en: With the Balmung in your inventory, chop down the Blossoming tree north-west of the bridge south of Rellekka.
text.es: Con el Balmung en tu inventario, tala el Blossoming tree al noroeste del puente al sur de Rellekka.

text.en: Take the chest from tree stump.
text.es: Coge el cofre del tocón del árbol.

text.en: Return and talk to Koschei.
text.es: Regresa y habla con Koschei.

text.en: Open the chest.
text.es: Abre el cofre.

text.en: Inspect the toy ship.
text.es: Examina el barco de juguete.

text.en: Talk to Koschei.
text.es: Habla con Koschei.

text.en: Climb up the ladder and return to Rellekka.
text.es: Sube por la escalera y regresa a Rellekka.

text.en: Go to the well south-east of the longhall.
text.es: Ve al pozo al sureste del longhall.

text.en: Use the toy ship on the well.
text.es: Usa el barco de juguete en el pozo.

text.en: Return and talk to Koschei.
text.es: Regresa y habla con Koschei.

text.en: Interact with the jewel. (opciones de chat: 1 Attempt to cut the jewel)
text.es: Interactúa con la joya. (opciones de chat: 1 Attempt to cut the jewel)

text.en: Talk to Koschei.
text.es: Habla con Koschei.

text.en: Miniquest complete!
text.es: ¡Minimisión completada!

text.en: For additional completion, talk to Kharshai. (opciones de chat: 4 I want to talk about your identity crisis. • 3 About that jewel... • 1 May I have a look at the jewel?)
text.es: Para una finalización adicional, habla con Kharshai. (opciones de chat: 4 I want to talk about your identity crisis. • 3 About that jewel... • 1 May I have a look at the jewel?)

text.en: Interact blue jewel (opciones de chat: 2 Attempt to crush the jewel) (Requires )
text.es: Interactúa con la joya azul (opciones de chat: 2 Attempt to crush the jewel) (Requiere )

text.en: Talk to Kharshai. (opciones de chat: 4 I want to talk about your identity crisis. • 3 Kharshai, have a look at the jewel.)
text.es: Habla con Kharshai. (opciones de chat: 4 I want to talk about your identity crisis. • 3 Kharshai, have a look at the jewel.)

text.en: Talk to Kharshai again. (opciones de chat: 4 I want to talk about your identity crisis. • 3 About that jewel... • 2 May I have a look at the jewel?)
text.es: Habla con Kharshai de nuevo. (opciones de chat: 4 I want to talk about your identity crisis. • 3 About that jewel... • 2 May I have a look at the jewel?)

text.en: Interact red jewel (opciones de chat: 3 Attempt to detect any curses) (Requires )
text.es: Interactúa con la joya roja (opciones de chat: 3 Attempt to detect any curses) (Requiere )

text.en: Talk to Kharshai. (opciones de chat: 4 I want to talk about your identity crisis. • 3 Kharshai, have a look at the jewel.)
text.es: Habla con Kharshai. (opciones de chat: 4 I want to talk about your identity crisis. • 3 Kharshai, have a look at the jewel.)

text.en: Repeat the steps once again but make a new memory instead (blue) and the miniquest will be completed
text.es: Repite los pasos una vez más, pero crea un nuevo recuerdo en su lugar (azul) y se completará la minimisión.
